## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem or limitation you're running into.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to happen? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, or any other context that helps explain the idea.
